summary.zh: 用可取消的进度反馈表达长按确认，降低误触风险。
summary.en: Show cancellable progress during hold-to-confirm interactions to reduce mistakes.

definition.zh: 用户持续按住按钮时逐步填满的进度效果。
definition.en: A timed progress indicator advances while continuous press input is maintained and completes at a threshold.

description.zh: 保留足够的按住时间来表达明确意图；松开后的恢复应保持短促。
description.en: Leaves enough hold time to express deliberate intent; release recovery should stay brief.

description.zh: 控制元素相对最终尺寸的起始比例。
description.en: Controls the starting size relative to the final state.

description.zh: 控制速度随时间变化的方式。
description.en: Controls how velocity changes over time.

purpose.zh: 用可取消的持续进度确认高风险操作，降低误触概率。
purpose.en: Confirm a high-risk action through cancellable sustained progress, reducing accidental activation.

frequency.zh: 仅用于低频且有后果的操作；日常按钮避免增加等待。
frequency.en: Reserve for infrequent consequential actions and keep ordinary controls immediate.

trigger.zh: 按下并持续保持时开始，达到阈值后只提交一次。
trigger.en: Begin on sustained press and submit exactly once when the threshold is reached.

enterExit.zh: 进度从零连续填满；提前释放、移出或取消时平滑清空并回到待机。
enterExit.en: Fill progress continuously from zero, clearing and returning to idle on early release, exit, or cancel.

interruptibility.zh: 任何取消事件都立即停止计时，重新按下从零开始并提供明确状态。
interruptibility.en: Every cancel event stops timing immediately; a new press restarts from zero with a clear state.

gestureRules.zh: 支持指针捕获、触摸取消和键盘长按；同时提供可访问的替代确认流程。
gestureRules.en: Support pointer capture, touch cancellation, and keyboard holding, plus an accessible alternative confirmation flow.

reducedMotion.zh: 保留静态进度或倒计时文本，移除填充运动，并允许常规二次确认。
reducedMotion.en: Use static progress or countdown text without filling motion, and allow a standard two-step confirmation.

reviewNotes.zh: 验证 pointercancel、窗口失焦和触摸滚动取消。
reviewNotes.en: Test pointercancel, window blur, and touch-scroll cancellation.

reviewNotes.zh: 通过 aria-live 克制地宣布完成状态。
